infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow access to your photo library to select profiles pictures and share media
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow access to your camera to capture photos and videos
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow access to your microphone to record voice messages
infoPlist.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: Allow access to documents for file sharing

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Next Chat to access your photos and videos
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Next Chat to access your camera

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Next Chat to access your microphone to record voice messages
